description: This file is a Spring Boot configuration class that wires together notification providers (email and SMS) and notification services for the application. It initializes beans for EmailProvider, SmsProvider, and NotificationService based on application properties, with logic to select specific providers like Mailjet, SendGrid, Twilio, or stub implementations.

classes.name: NotificationConfig
classes.description: Spring Boot configuration class to set up notification-related beans, including email and SMS providers and notification service.

methods.name: emailProvider
methods.description: Creates and returns an appropriate EmailProvider implementation based on configuration properties and presence of credentials.

methods.name: notBlank
methods.description: Utility method to check if a string is not null and not blank.

methods.name: smsProvider
methods.description: Creates and returns an appropriate SmsProvider implementation based on configuration properties.

methods.name: notificationService
methods.description: Creates NotificationService bean with injected EmailProvider and SmsProvider.
